ham.subject: Scheduled Corporate VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We would like to inform you that a scheduled maintenance of the corporate VPN will take place on 10th May 2026 from 22:00 to 02:00 UTC. During this period, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable. Please ensure that you are not working on any VPN‑dependent tasks during this window.

If you have any urgent requirements, please contact the IT Helpdesk at <EMAIL> or call 123‑456‑7890. We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Infrastructure Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Income Tax Refund is Pending – Quick Action Required!
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed your refund of ₹2,50,000. However, to release the funds, we require some additional verification. Please click on the link below and provide your PAN, bank account details, and a recent utility bill for verification:

<URL>

This process must be completed within 48 hours to avoid delay. Failure to comply will result in your refund being forfeited.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
Tax Clearance Division
